evals.description: Agent correctly describes the InsurancePolicy status transition sequence from application to expiry
evals.prompt: What is the correct status lifecycle for an InsurancePolicy record in Salesforce FSC from initial creation through expiration?

evals.description: Agent identifies all required fields for InsurancePolicyCoverage before policy activation
evals.prompt: What fields are required on InsurancePolicyCoverage before an InsurancePolicy can be activated in FSC?

evals.description: Agent correctly distinguishes CoverageAmount (limit) from DeductibleAmount
evals.prompt: In FSC Insurance, what is the difference between CoverageAmount and DeductibleAmount on InsurancePolicyCoverage?
expected_topics: CoverageAmount is the maximum the insurer pays
DeductibleAmount is what the insured pays before coverage applies
PremiumAmount is what the insured pays for coverage

evals.description: Agent correctly lists InsurancePolicyParticipant roles and their constraints
evals.prompt: What participant roles are available on InsurancePolicyParticipant in FSC Insurance, and are there any uniqueness constraints?

evals.description: Agent clearly distinguishes a policy endorsement from a cancellation and explains why you must not delete-recreate coverage
evals.prompt: A customer wants to increase their liability coverage limit mid-term. Should I cancel and reissue the policy, or use an endorsement? What objects do I create in Salesforce FSC?
expected_topics: do not delete and recreate coverage

evals.description: Agent correctly states reinstatement eligibility rules including the expiration date check
evals.prompt: Under what conditions can a cancelled FSC Insurance policy be reinstated in Salesforce?
expected_topics: CancellationReason must not be UnderwritingDecline or Misrepresentation
PolicyExpirationDate must still be in the future
underwriting review if lapse exceeds threshold
new policy required if expiration has passed

evals.description: Agent knows that renewal creates a new InsurancePolicy record and does not extend PolicyExpirationDate in place
evals.prompt: How does policy renewal work in Salesforce FSC? Does it extend the existing policy's expiration date or create a new record?
expected_topics: PriorPolicyId set on the new policy
expiring policy Status transitions to Expired
PolicyTransaction TransactionType Renewal on new policy
do not extend PolicyExpirationDate on existing record
new PolicyEffectiveDate equals day after prior expiration

evals.description: Agent uses ContentDocumentLink and InsurancePolicyDocument, never the deprecated Attachment object
evals.prompt: How do I attach a declarations page PDF to an InsurancePolicy record in Salesforce FSC?

evals.description: Agent identifies the correct permission sets needed for policy administration and warns against profiles-only approach
evals.prompt: What permission sets are required for a policy servicing agent to read and edit insurance policies in FSC?

evals.description: Agent correctly explains flat vs. pro-rata vs. short-rate cancellation and when each is used
evals.prompt: What are the three types of policy cancellation in FSC Insurance, and how is the return premium calculated for each?
expected_topics: flat cancellation full return of premium
pro-rata cancellation unused days over total days

evals.description: Agent correctly identifies that InsurancePolicyAsset links to InsurancePolicyCoverage, not directly to InsurancePolicy
evals.prompt: I need to link a vehicle to a policy in FSC Insurance. What object do I create and what is the parent relationship?
expected_topics: subquery to traverse InsurancePolicy to Coverages to Assets

evals.description: Agent warns that a null BillingAccountId blocks activation when the org setting is enabled
evals.prompt: I'm trying to activate an InsurancePolicy in FSC but it's failing. The policy has coverages and a PolicyHolder participant. What else might be missing?
expected_topics: BillingAccount is not a standard Account
